meta.name: llm-tracker

swimlanes.label: Core Runtime
swimlanes.description: Deterministic retrieval, execution contracts, and hub behavior.

swimlanes.label: Workflow + UX
swimlanes.description: CLI, docs, UI surfaces, and maintainability work.

meta.scratchpad: Project-local workspace added to stress-test the new daemon against an existing-style tracker file.

__added__.title: Ship deterministic next/blockers/changed/pick core
__added__.goal: Land the initial task-intelligence substrate before moving on to richer retrieval packs.
__added__.comment: Completed locally before adding this repo-local workspace.

__added__.title: Build snippet-cache groundwork for brief packs
__added__.goal: Cache deterministic code and doc snippets under runtime storage so brief packs can stay small and stable.
__added__.comment: Use the older task schema here on purpose to test backward compatibility.

__added__.title: Expose brief packs through API and CLI
__added__.goal: Give agents one-call context packs once snippet caching exists.

__added__.title: Add MCP wrappers over deterministic tracker operations
__added__.goal: Expose next, blockers, changed, pick, and future brief through MCP on top of the shared core.
__added__.comment: Thin wrappers only. HTTP remains the source of truth.

__added__.title: Break down oversized modules without behavior regressions
__added__.goal: Continue splitting large files into smaller modules while preserving compatibility and coverage.
__added__.comment: Maintainability is part of the current plan, not deferred cleanup.

__added__.title: Add execute and verify contract flows
__added__.goal: Build execution packs and verification once brief packs exist.
__added__.comment: Deferred until retrieval packs are in place.

to.label: Core Runtime
to.description: Deterministic retrieval, execution contracts, and hub behavior.

to.label: Workflow + UX
to.description: CLI, docs, UI surfaces, and maintainability work.

summary.to: Project-local workspace added to stress-test the new daemon against an existing-style tracker file.

summary.title: Build snippet-cache groundwork for brief packs
Expose brief packs through API and CLI
Add MCP wrappers over deterministic tracker operations

Add execute and verify contract flows
